textByHash.4dff29797ef6959e239817aacaac168f1a9f15f8: He went to get help days ago.
textByHash.9b579fc5860c9b45e69818be4e13d7742d010dd0: The nasty fishermen tried to throw me and daddy into the sea. So he told me to hide here.
textByHash.a8047ae9e722e4348c84470c23603d0ef14c93ab: I'm scared of those nasty sea slugs. I won't go near them.
textByHash.863c87e927e6479fd6c08a3ce2dfa8fee7c975ed: Are there any sea slugs on the other side?
textByHash.68b260a361cd89a40b0fcc6fd7d32946274a72fe: Ok, when you have I'll come out.
textByHash.70e884c4b2c4b1e4a5f2bec6240179bbc957202b: Great mister! Thanks again for rescuing me.
